visual_description: A group of people stands facing a large screen displaying a news report with a man’s face and text; some are in uniform, others in casual attire, all with their backs to the camera. They appear to be watching intently, with minimal movement, as the screen shows a scene involving a person in a white coat and another individual. The setting is an indoor space with dim lighting, marble walls, and a hanging lamp above.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice delivering a solemn statement with a slow pace and a low pitch, conveying a sense of deep sorrow and respect.
